## Outcome

Describe the user-visible or engineering result.

## Invariants

- [ ] Existing MSC1-through-MSC6 decoder compatibility is preserved.
- [ ] Authentication, parser bounds, safe paths, and atomic publication remain intact.
- [ ] Any format or mode change includes documentation, fixtures, and fuzz coverage.
- [ ] Benchmark claims use committed inputs and report regressions honestly.

## Verification

- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Ruff
- [ ] Strict mypy
- [ ] Coverage (minimum 80%)
- [ ] Bandit and dependency audit
- [ ] Build and installed-artifact smoke test
- [ ] Relevant benchmark, fuzz, or soak evidence

## Evidence

List exact commands, measurements, and artifact links.
